definition: physical, chemical or biological conditions, external to a product, to which it is subjected at a certain time

definition_ml.en: physical, chemical or biological conditions, external to a product, to which it is subjected at a certain time

note: NOTE 1  Environmental conditions are generally composed of environmental conditions appearing in nature and environmental conditions generated by the product itself or by external sources ||, NOTE 2 The characteristics specified allow judgment about |, - possibly required additional shelters for objects in order to operate in this environment, or |, -  to take appropriate other measures to ensure the suitability of the object for operating in this environment
